cart.emptyDescription: Add products to compare prices, deliveries and seller trust signals.

cart.toastDescriptionFallback: Review the summary and continue with your purchase.

product.deliveryEta: Estimated arrival between tomorrow and the next 48 business hours.

out.label: Out of stock
out.urgency: This product will be back soon.

available.label: In stock
available.urgency: Delivery available with cash on delivery

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Guided flow to complete your order with less friction and more confidence.
checkout.noProductsDescription: Add products to the cart before opening checkout.
checkout.successDescription: The order was recorded with cash on delivery. Save this reference and check your email for the next step.
checkout.readyToConfirmDescription: We reviewed your order, address and final total. Confirming creates the order immediately.
checkout.noPhone: We will confirm by email if you do not add a phone number.
checkout.primaryActionDescription: Confirm your order with cash on delivery and email tracking.
checkout.validationNameEmail: Complete name and email to continue.
checkout.validationAddress: Add a shipping address to continue.
checkout.submitError: The order could not be processed.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Review orders, address and purchase status.

seller.subtitle: Manage catalog, inventory and orders without mixing the public store.

admin.title: Admin center

adminAnalytics.loadingDescription: Preparing funnel summary and recent activity.
adminAnalytics.providerDescription: The local panel only shows metrics when the provider is internal.
adminAnalytics.providerInfo: The current environment is configured with {{provider}}. Event integration was kept, but the local dashboard needs `VITE_ANALYTICS_PROVIDER=internal` and `ANALYTICS_PROVIDER=internal`.
adminAnalytics.funnelDescription: Funnel and session behavior for the {{range}} range.
adminAnalytics.sessionsDescription: Distinct sessions with events in range.
adminAnalytics.viewProductDescription: Times a product page was opened.
adminAnalytics.startCheckoutDescription: Users who advanced through the first checkout step.
adminAnalytics.completeOrderDescription: Orders confirmed from the checkout flow.
adminAnalytics.addRateDescription: Ratio between product views and add-to-cart events.
adminAnalytics.cartRateDescription: Ratio between add-to-cart events and cart views.
adminAnalytics.completionRateDescription: Ratio between checkout start and completed order.

adminCategories.newDescription: Manage catalog taxonomy without touching the server.

adminUsers.description: Create and maintain administrators, sellers and buyers.

orders.managementDescription: Typed listing connected to `/api/orders` without mixing it with the public store.
orders.emptyDescription: There are no orders matching the current filter yet.
orders.ordersDescription: Records visible for the authenticated role.
orders.amountDescription: Visible total in the current view.

productManagement.catalogDescription: Modular editing without touching server logic.
productManagement.productCountDescription: Support for CRUD and synced stock.

productManagement.saveError: The product could not be saved.

sellerOverview.billingDescription: Sum of subtotals per sold item.

accountOverview.profileDescription: Quick access to your account status and next steps.

operations.lastRunDescription: Time of the worker's last pass.
operations.emailOutboxDescription: Retry and cleanup for failed rows.

home.supportTitle: Purchase-focused exploration with real seller context
home.supportDescription: Search is always visible, pricing scans fast, and every product shows rating, stock and seller signals without mixing internal panels.
home.trendingDescription: High-interest items detected from the live catalog with rating, review and availability signals.
home.dealsDescription: Price-sensitive selections that keep review quality and seller trust front and center.
home.sellersDescription: Featured sellers are calculated with catalog depth and customer feedback to compare stores faster.
home.catalogDescription: Information-dense cards optimized for fast desktop scanning and mobile touch navigation.

hero.title: Find your next device faster with search-first browsing and useful context on every product.
hero.description: Explore laptops, gaming peripherals and components with live pricing, seller credibility and product pages designed for frictionless buying.
hero.spotlightNote: High visibility, trust signals and a shorter path to purchase.
hero.loadingDescription: The homepage is built from the public product feed without changing existing APIs.

productsPage.title: Find products faster with search, sorting and reusable modules
productsPage.description: This catalog keeps dashboards intact while improving scan speed, product context and mobile navigation.
productsPage.emptyDescription: Adjust search, category or sorting to discover more products.

categoryPage.description: Showing {{count}} products with store filters separated from admin views.
categoryPage.emptyDescription: Try another price range or sorting mode.
categoryPage.sidebarDescription: Narrow the catalog without leaving the public store.

footer.description: Full marketplace for technology, gadgets and multi-role management.
footer.securePurchase: Secure purchase with cash on delivery.
footer.separatePanels: Separate dashboards for administration, sellers and account.
